name: Arn Media Limited
analysis: A1N's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 57% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$0.2450, stop A$0.2079, target A$0.2700 (0.67:1) — then trail it.
